name: First Progress Platinum Mastercard (Secured)
credit_required: No minimum credit score required (secured, credit-builder)

earning_rates.notes: No rewards on standard purchases. Note: The Prestige variant offers up to 10% cash back at select merchants and 1% on payments.

other_benefits.name: Credit building
other_benefits.description: Reports to all three major credit bureaus monthly

other_benefits.name: Instant approval
other_benefits.description: Instant approval available online or by phone

notes: First Progress offers multiple secured card variants issued by Pinnacle Bank: Platinum Select ($39 annual fee, 17.49% APR), Platinum Elite ($39 annual fee, 17.49% APR), and Platinum Prestige ($49 annual fee, 13.49% APR — lowest rate but highest fee). All require $200–$2,000 security deposit. Annual fee is charged upon account opening and deducted from credit limit. Cards are not upgradeable to unsecured. Not suitable for international travel due to 3% foreign transaction fee.
